---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to planning or visualization
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What planning or visualization need does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior and affected workflow.

## Data and Environment

- Sample schema: list required columns and separators only. Do not include private POI or location data.
- Command or workflow where this is needed:
- Environment: OS, Python version, dependency versions, and browser version when relevant:

## Expected Coverage Behavior

Explain how the change should affect coverage, capacity, site assignments, or map output.

## Diagnostics

Include a traceback or log excerpt only when relevant, with credentials, local paths, and sensitive coordinates removed.

## Alternatives

Describe any workaround or alternative considered.
